title: Antibody Serology Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
rvices: Overview of Testing for SARS-CoV-2; [reviewed 2024 Aug 29; cited 2025 Jul 30]; [about 4 screens]. Available from: https://www.cdc.gov/covid/hcp/clinical-care/overview-testing-sars-cov-2.html
